---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem to solve

A clear description of the problem or limitation this feature would address.

## Proposed solution

What you would like to see implemented.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Scope

Does this change affect:
- [ ] Telegram UX / bot flow
- [ ] AI generation / prompt
- [ ] Domain Packs
- [ ] Docker / deployment
- [ ] Documentation only

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
